description: Curated index of durable role documents.
source_of_truth_note: Role docs are authoritative; this registry supports orientation.

items.name: Orchestrator
items.purpose: Frame prompt-bounded work, protect scope, coordinate lanes, and decide when escalation or bridge handoff is needed.
items.safe_use_notes: The Orchestrator frames work but does not replace operator approval.

items.name: Lead
items.purpose: Own a lane of work, decompose tasks, review outputs, and integrate bounded results.
items.safe_use_notes: Lead authority is scoped to the assigned lane.

items.name: Worker
items.purpose: Execute a narrow task with explicit inputs, outputs, validation, and stop conditions.
items.safe_use_notes: Workers should not expand scope or overwrite unrelated changes.

items.name: Supporting Roles
items.purpose: Name support functions for orchestration, cognitive work, repo intelligence, and process review.
items.safe_use_notes: Supporting roles are labels for responsibilities, not separate hidden agents.

items.name: Role Boundary Matrix
items.purpose: Clarify authority boundaries across the operator, Orchestrator, Leads, Workers, and support roles.
items.safe_use_notes: Use this to prevent authority drift during execution.
